title: TagoIO Device
description: A TagoIO IoT device with its configuration, tags, and metadata.

id.description: Unique device identifier assigned by TagoIO.

active.description: Whether the device is currently active and accepting data.

visible.description: Whether the device is visible in the TagoRUN portal.

type.description: Device storage type: mutable or immutable.

tags.description: Key-value tags for organizing and filtering devices.

connector.description: Connector ID linking the device to a network integration.

network.description: Network ID the device belongs to.

payload_decoder.description: JavaScript payload parser script for decoding raw device payloads.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the device was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the device was last updated.

last_input.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last data ingestion.

bucket.description: Internal storage bucket ID associated with the device.
